message:
Clickable repo cards + fix vanishing intensity gauge (#140)

* Make repository cards clickable — repo name, issues, PRs open GitHub

Repo name links to the root GitHub page, issue count links to
/issues, PR count links to /pulls. All open in new tabs. Hover
underlines to signal interactivity.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Fix intensity gauge vanishing when token usage is flat or declining

The gauge disappeared when trailing token rates were zero or negative
(sessions expiring from 24h window). Now uses absolute trail rate for
comparison and always contributes to totalWeight, so the gauge shows
"idle" at far-left instead of vanishing entirely.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
